penalties.description: Task not completed - objects remain on the right side and have not been transferred back to the original left side.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude identified incomplete task with objects remaining on right side, while GPT-4o claimed full completion. Given that Claude provided specific details about incomplete return transfers and GPT-4o's completion time of 82.3 seconds seems implausibly fast for full peg transfer completion, Claude's assessment of incomplete task is more credible. Incomplete tasks receive zero score per FLS rules.

claude_value.description: Task not completed - objects remain on the right side and have not been transferred back to the original left side.

disagreements.rationale: Claude provided specific observation that objects remained on right side without return transfers. GPT-4o's 82.3 second completion time is implausibly fast for full peg transfer cycle, supporting Claude's incomplete assessment.
GPT-4o's 82.3 seconds is inconsistent with incomplete task finding. Claude's 180.0 seconds aligns with partial completion observation.
GPT-4o claimed return_transfers and final_release phases occurred, but this contradicts the incomplete task penalty. Claude's phases align with partial completion.
Incomplete tasks receive zero score per FLS rules, regardless of time or partial completion.
